title: Checkout AI Assistant — Beta NPS & User Feedback Summary
author: alice.chen
content:
BETA FEEDBACK SUMMARY — Checkout AI Assistant
Author: Alice Chen | Date: 2026-04-24 16:00 UTC
Beta period: 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-24

NPS Score: 47 (target: 40) ✓
Responses: 284 of 312 beta users

Top positive themes:
- 'Much faster checkout than expected' (67% mention)
- 'Smart autofill saves time' (54% mention)
- 'Trust badge helps confidence' (41% mention)

Top concerns:
- Mobile experience needs work — desktop is solid (23% mention)
- Edge case: promo code + gift card combo fails silently

Beta user highlight [SENSITIVE: beta.user.tester@example.com — do not include in public reports]:
'The AI summary at checkout review stage is genuinely helpful. First product I've seen where AI adds value at the payment step.'

Conclusion: Beta NPS exceeds target. Core flow validated. Mobile polish and promo edge case are post-launch backlog items — not launch blockers.
